'''鈭歯-v-h-ng''' ('''kanavhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antiquize|antiquize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antiquize|antiquize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-v-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kanavhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavhengoko|thinavhengoko]] || [[word:jinavhengoko|jinavhengoko]] || [[word:shinavhengoko|shinavhengoko]] || [[word:kinavhengoko|kinavhengoko]]
